name: Flow H - Opportunity Matching
description: Daily trigger 9 AM ET. Fetch new contracts from Intelligence table. Match contracts to qualified suppliers based on category, location, certification, capacity. Calculate match_score (0-100). Create Supplier_Opportunities records. Log results.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: {{ JSON.stringify({opportunity_id: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.opportunity_id, opportunity_name: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.opportunity_name, supplier_id: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.supplier_id, supplier_email: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.supplier_email, match_score: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.match_score, match_reason: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.match_reason, contract_deadline: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.contract_deadline, contract_value_usd: $node['Calculate Match Scores'].json.contract_value, status: 'Available'}) }}
